description: Simcardo sells digital travel eSIM data plans for destinations worldwide. It also offers a read-only connectivity-planning experience inside ChatGPT to help travelers estimate data needs, compare connectivity options, and get destination-specific setup notes.
summary: Simcardo exposes two public MCP surfaces on simcardo.com for its ChatGPT/agent connectivity-planning tools: a general MCP endpoint at `/mcp` and a curated Connectivity Planner MCP at `/mcp-trip/`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was documented.
